title: stelis cuculligera
intro: Stelis cuculligera, also known as the hooded stelis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin infections. The health benefits of Stelis cuculligera include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Stelis cuculligera can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
